zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches於1218年出生在法國崔洛易特庫尼時，他的父親Robert de Courtenay Seigneur de Champignelles50歲，母親Mahaut de Mehun23歲。他於1249年6月與Pétronille DE JOIGNY在法國布格-福朗-可特艾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1250年2月8日在阿爾及利亞قسنطينة曼素拉享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches于1218年出生在法国崔洛易特庫尼时，他的父亲Robert de Courtenay Seigneur de Champignelles50岁，母亲Mahaut de Mehun23岁。他于1249年6月与Pétronille DE JOIGNY在法国布格-福朗-可特艾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1250年2月8日在阿尔及利亚قسنطينة曼素拉享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, originally a Norman baronial name from any of various places in northern France called Courtenay, the original meaning of which is ‘domain of Curtius’. However, from an early period it was wrongly taken as a nickname derived from Old French court nez ‘short nose’. In the U.K. it is found chiefly as a girl's name.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches was born in 1218, in Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France, his father, Robert de Courtenay Seigneur de Champignelles, was 50 and his mother, Mahaut de Mehun, was 23. He married Pétronille DE JOIGNY in June 1249, in Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 8 February 1250, in Mansourah, Constantine, Algeria, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches est né en 1218, à Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France, son père, Robert de Courtenay Seigneur de Champignelles, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Mahaut de Mehun, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Pétronille DE JOIGNY en juin 1249, à Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 février 1250, à Mansourah, Constantine, Algérie, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches 1218 in Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Courtenay Seigneur de Champignelles 50 und seine Mutter Mahaut de Mehun 23. Er hat im Juni 1249 in Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich Pétronille DE JOIGNY geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. Februar 1250 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Mansourah, Constantine, Algerien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches è nato il nel 1218 nel Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, Francia, il suo padre, Robert de Courtenay Seigneur de Champignelles, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Mahaut de Mehun, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Pétronille DE JOIGNY nel giugno 1249, nel Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 8 febbraio 1250, nel Mansourah, Constantine, Algeria, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conchesが1218年にフランスセントアロイアーエトコウルテナイで生まれた時，父Robert de Courtenay Seigneur de Champignellesは50歳，母Mahaut de Mehunは23歳であった。1249年6月にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeイオンでPétronille DE JOIGNYと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1250年2月8日にアルジェリアقسنطينةマンソウラで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches(이)가 1218년 프랑스 세트르 로이렛 쿠르텐아이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Courtenay Seigneur de Champignelles(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Mahaut de Mehun(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1249년 6월 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 욘에서 Pétronille DE JOIGNY(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1250년 2월 8일 알제리 قسنطينة 먼소우라에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches nasceu em 1218, em Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, França, seu pai, Robert de Courtenay Seigneur de Champignelles, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Mahaut de Mehun, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Pétronille DE JOIGNY em junho de 1249, em Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1250, em Mansourah, Constantine, Algéria, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches родился в 1218 г. в местности коуртенеи, лоирет, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert de Courtenay Seigneur de Champignelles было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Mahaut de Mehun, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Pétronille DE JOIGNY июнь 1249 г. в местности енн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 8 февраля 1250 г. в местности мансоурах, قسنطينة, Алжир в возрасте 32 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter of Courtenay Lord of Conches nació en 1218, en Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, Francia, su papá, Robert de Courtenay Seigneur de Champignelles, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Mahaut de Mehun, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Pétronille DE JOIGNY en junio de 1249, en Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 8 de febrero de 1250, en Mansourah, Constantine, Argelia, a la edad de 32 años.
